text: Investigation 2026-07-02: UNBLOCKED. gh auth is restored (bbuchsbaum, repo scope, keyring). Pages API still 404 (has_pages=false), repo public, origin/gh-pages exists at 1a54f41 (advanced past the 34d5dbe noted earlier — pkgdown workflow ran again). Only remaining step: gh api --method POST repos/bbuchsbaum/amatrix/pages -f 'source[branch]=gh-pages' -f 'source[path]=/' — attempted but the permission classifier reserved public-surface creation for the user. Run that one command (or Settings > Pages > deploy from branch gh-pages /), then verify https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/amatrix/ serves.
